args.body: Concern raised on behalf of Sana Malik: donor identified for thank-you letter is in active invoice dispute with the nonprofit. Thank-you letter placed on hold pending Finance & Compliance review to avoid acknowledging a donation while a financial dispute is unresolved. Escalated to Finance & Compliance.

Hi Sana,

Thank you for flagging this — you were right to pause. Sending a donor thank-you letter while that donor's company is disputing unpaid invoices to the nonprofit creates a real conflict and reputational risk, so we should not proceed with the acknowledgement until that's resolved.

I've raised the concern to Finance & Compliance for review and documented it on the ticket. Please hold the letter until they come back with guidance. You don't need to take any further action right now.

Thanks again for catching this.

args.resolution: Concern raised on Sana's behalf: donor is in active invoice dispute with the nonprofit. Thank-you letter held; escalated to Finance & Compliance; memo filed; Sana notified to pause pending guidance.

args.summary: Held the thank-you letter, escalated the donor invoice-dispute conflict to Finance & Compliance, filed an internal memo, replied to Sana explaining the pause, and closed T-379.
